shadowSentences: I love to read books in my free time.
My favorite season is autumn because of the colors.
I often go for a walk in the park nearby.
Cooking new recipes is one of my hobbies.
Spending time with family makes me very happy.
I enjoy watching movies on weekends with friends.
Traveling to new places helps me learn about cultures.
I usually listen to music while studying or working.
My hometown has beautiful parks and friendly people.
Learning a new language opens up many opportunities in life.
interviewQuestions: What do you like to do in your free time?
What is your favorite book and why?
How do you usually celebrate your birthday?
What hobbies do you have and how did you start them?
How do you stay organized with your schoolwork?
What is your favorite family tradition?
Why is it important to spend time with friends?
What type of music do you enjoy the most?
How do you usually relax after a long day?
What is your favorite food and how is it made?
If you could travel anywhere, where would you go?
